# blong.dev — Braedon Long

> Braedon Long is a builder working on knowledge graphs, AI infrastructure,
> and working demos. This is his personal site: who he is, what he has built,
> and how to reach him.

## Pages

- [Home](https://blong.dev/): overview and current work
- [About](https://blong.dev/about/): background and contact
- [Portfolio](https://blong.dev/portfolio/): selected projects with write-ups
- [Stack](https://blong.dev/stack/): the tools and infrastructure he builds with
- [Demos](https://blong.dev/demos/): live, working demonstrations
- [Blog](https://blong.dev/blog/): technical writing

## Related properties

- [Tail Atlas](https://tailatlas.com/): aircraft-registry intelligence for
  piston general aviation
- [Telekora](https://telekora.com/): learning platform for teams
- [HometownWire](https://hometownwire.org/): the public record of local
  government, starting with Cincinnati
